metadata.description: WAUTH doorkeeper plugins — risk-tiered, human-approved access to GitHub, Stripe, and Salesforce for AI agents. Thin clients over the doorkeeper MCP; the agent never holds a platform credential.

plugins.name: wauth-github
plugins.description: GitHub coding-agent actions via the WAUTH GitHub doorkeeper (protected-branch merges → passkey; force-push / CI-bypass / branch-protection / secrets → passkey + iProov liveness).

plugins.name: wauth-stripe
plugins.description: Stripe actions via the WAUTH Stripe doorkeeper (passkey + iProov liveness for high-risk).

plugins.name: wauth-salesforce
plugins.description: Salesforce actions via the WAUTH Salesforce doorkeeper (production writes + protected objects escalate to passkey + liveness).

plugins.name: wauth-entra
plugins.description: Microsoft Entra identity actions via the WAUTH Entra doorkeeper (directory reads free; MFA reset / privileged role grant → passkey + iProov liveness).

plugins.name: wauth-saas-jit
plugins.description: Just-in-time, time-limited SaaS access via the WAUTH SaaS JIT control plane (AFPS) — production grant → passkey; privileged/admin or contained-token mode → passkey + iProov liveness; auto-revoked + reconciled, agent never holds the credential.

plugins.name: wauth-verifiable-intent
plugins.description: Intent-bound commerce via the WAUTH Verifiable-Intent doorkeeper — the agent presents a signed Verifiable-Intent mandate (merchant, amount ceiling, item, validity) and the doorkeeper verifies the order is inside that envelope under a merchant lock. Reads free; order within the mandate → passkey; over-threshold / new payee / missing-or-invalid mandate → passkey + iProov liveness; agent never holds a payment credential.

plugins.name: wauth-digital-credentials
plugins.description: Wallet-credential presentment via the WAUTH Digital-Credentials doorkeeper (Apple Wallet / Digital Credentials API / mdoc / EUDI) — the doorkeeper verifies the presentation (issuer-signed, holder-bound, aud/nonce-bound, unexpired) and issues scoped authority. Reading accepted types free; standard credential → passkey; high-assurance identity / age / KYC / government-ID or failed binding → passkey + iProov liveness; agent never holds the raw credential.

plugins.name: wauth-link
plugins.description: Link a payment key to an agent under a WAUTH merchant lock via the WAUTH Link doorkeeper, then pay against it. Reading the instrument free; payment to a known destination within threshold → passkey; new key / new destination / over-threshold → passkey + iProov liveness. Live-vs-sandbox is server-authoritative; the agent never sees the key.
